channel.title: Projects on Hollis Akins
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Hollis Akins

item.title: Simulated Dwarf Galaxies
item.description: Summer research project studying the evolution and star-formation properties of dwarf satellite galaxies using ultra-high resolution cosmological simulations.

item.title: Astrophotography
item.description: Snapshots of the night sky and its many mysteries.

item.title: Perspectives
item.description: A series of surreal photographs created with a unique analog darkroom process.

item.title: Automated Data Reduction
item.description: Summer research project at the Guilford College Cline Observatory, developing a tool for programatic photometry and variable star studies.

item.title: Lucky Imaging
item.description: Artistic planetary astrophotography using the lucky imaging technique.

item.title: Urban Green Space
item.description: GIS project exploring urban green space and environmental justice in Seattle, WA.

item.title: Urban Sprawl
item.description: GIS project exploring the extent of urban sprawl in Portland, OR.
